case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1637 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6385/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6386/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 09-09-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing viz. 26-11-2024. Thereafter no one has turned up to pursue this petition. The conduct of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that they have lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
